name: pi-files-touched
description_en: Deterministic file-activity tracking for Pi sessions, covering native tools, RepoPrompt, and bash commands.  Includes /files-touched picker and a shared core for compaction/handover extensions
description_zh: Pi 会话的确定性文件活动跟踪，涵盖原生工具、RepoPrompt 和 bash 命令。包括 /files-touched 选择器和用于压缩/交接扩展的共享核心
